name: Sprint Closure & Next Planning
prompt: Sprint 3 is ending tomorrow. Walk me through: closing the sprint (handling carryover), running a retrospective, publishing the GitHub release v0.3.0, and planning Sprint 4 with the top backlog items. Repo: mycompany/auth-service, milestone: 'Sprint 3'.

assertions.text: Shows how to move incomplete issues to Sprint 4 milestone (close Sprint 3 milestone or reassign)
Uses gh release create v0.3.0 with correct flags
Steps in logical order: carryover → retro → release → next sprint planning
Consistently uses gh CLI (not curl or API calls for GitHub operations)
